title: Email customization | Emmanuel Katto Uganda
excerpt: Hello folks, myself Emmanuel Katto from Uganda. I was sending an email yesterday through monday.com and I would love to customize the font of the email text to our identity’s choice. It is only possible to format color, …

posts.author: emmanuelkatto (Emmanuel Katto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello folks, myself Emmanuel Katto from Uganda. I was sending an email yesterday through monday.com and I would love to customize the font of the email text to our identity’s choice. It is only possible to format color, bold or italic and underlining.
Thanks!

posts.author: emmanuelkatto (Emmanuel Katto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Can anyone please help me with my query??

Looking forward to your responses.

posts.author: oliviacox (Olivia Cox)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Emmanuel Katto, So far you can only format color, bold or italic and underlining. Or you can create an email template and import it into monday app.

Thanks!
Olivia

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @emmanuelkatto @oliviacox,

You can use EasyMails app, you can use drag and drop template designer, easily upload files directly from your board column, and seamlessly integrate your board data into your email content.
It’s like having Mailchimp inside monday .com

Screenshot 2024-04-13 at 4.00.45 PM1446×831 113 KB

posts.author: oliviacox (Olivia Cox)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Kevin! I’ll try EasyMails app. Hey @emmanuelkatto Have you tried it yet?
